creator: evgeniy@kosov.su
text:
The port's pkg_plist doesn't seem to match files installed by the port.
As a result, tinderbox (ports-mgmt/tinderbox) fails to build this port and all of its dependants (which is rather critical).

How-To-Repeat: # make package
===> Fetching all distfiles required by rubygem-facter-1.6.18 for building
===>  Extracting for rubygem-facter-1.6.18
=> SHA256 Checksum OK for rubygem/facter-1.6.18.gem.
===>   rubygem-facter-1.6.18 depends on file: /usr/local/bin/gem18 - found
===>   rubygem-facter-1.6.18 depends on file: /usr/local/bin/ruby18 - found
Unpacked gem: '/var/ports/usr/ports/sysutils/rubygem-facter/work/facter-1.6.18'
